architecture_files.title: Agent execution contract
architecture_files.purpose: Defines execution rules, source priority, restore policy, command model, and failure conditions.
architecture_files.update_when: Update when process rules, restore policy, or command model changes.

architecture_files.title: Execution model
architecture_files.purpose: Defines restore->validate->locate->execute->update->sync lifecycle and stage branch transition behavior.
architecture_files.update_when: Update when execution lifecycle or stage transition policy changes.

architecture_files.title: System implementation plan
architecture_files.purpose: Defines stage, current task, and next tasks.

architecture_files.title: Product goal traceability matrix
architecture_files.purpose: Defines Requirement IDs and mandatory AI task alignment protocol.
architecture_files.update_when: Update when goals, Requirement IDs, or alignment policy changes.

nodes.name: recovery
nodes.description: Source-of-truth recovery layer and command contracts.

nodes.name: architecture
nodes.description: System rules, boundaries, and execution model.

nodes.name: ai_tasks
nodes.description: Execution units with acceptance and tests.

system_for_management.purpose: Template operating system for architecture-first AI-assisted delivery.
system_for_management.how_it_works: Execution follows source-priority restore, deterministic AI tasks, and architecture synchronization with populated context projection.
system_for_management.architecture_explained: Recovery, architecture, plans, and tasks are synchronized and projected into latest contextJSON for runtime truth.
system_for_management.model_relationships: Recovery governs execution contract; architecture governs rules; plans govern roadmap; tasks govern implementation.

project_status_for_customer.implemented: Template operating system files and process gates are in place.
project_status_for_customer.in_progress: Project-specific architecture and plan are expected to be filled after intake prompts.
project_status_for_customer.next: Define project-specific stages and begin AI task execution with Goal Alignment mapping.

last_iteration.summary_for_calendar: Template methodology synchronized with latest execution rules.
last_iteration.summary_for_status_report: Fast/Full context restore policy, goal traceability gates, and updated command mapping were integrated.

generation_rules.regeneration_trigger: Any architecture sync after archive upload, schema change, stage change, task change, or command-model change.
generation_rules.notes: Latest timestamped JSON is authoritative runtime snapshot. Markdown files are auxiliary raw-content sources by path.
